themes.name: Nord Aurora
themes.description: Cool arctic palette inspired by the Nord color system. Muted blues with aurora green accents.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Dracula
themes.description: The classic Dracula color scheme. Purple and pink on a dark charcoal base.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Solarized Dark
themes.description: Ethan Schoonover's precision-engineered Solarized palette on a dark base.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Rose Pine
themes.description: Soho vibes with muted rose and pine tones. Warm and easy on the eyes.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Tokyo Night
themes.description: Inspired by Tokyo's neon-lit skyline. Deep indigo with electric blue highlights.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: AMOLED Black
themes.description: True black backgrounds for OLED displays. Maximum contrast, minimum burn-in.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Cyberpunk Neon
themes.description: Netrunner terminal UI. Narrowed sidebar, sharp 2px geometry, scanlines, neon edge-glow on every surface, perspective-tilt cards.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Phosphor
themes.description: Full CRT terminal simulation. Square cards, monospace everything, scanlines, vignette, green-tinted images. Your media server is now a mainframe.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Vaporwave Sunset
themes.description: Floating glass sidebar, contained hero card, oversized rounded everything, gradient text headers. The whole app melts into a synthwave dream.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Solar Flare
themes.description: Wider sidebar with serif nav, 85vh hero, warm ember shadows, italic display headings, pulsing ambient glow. Film noir meets volcanic heat.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Catppuccin
themes.description: Pastel purple on warm dark blue. Based on the popular Catppuccin Mocha palette.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Gruvbox
themes.description: Warm retro with golden accent. Based on the classic Gruvbox Dark palette.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Void Space
themes.description: Cool blue on deep space black. GitHub-inspired dark palette.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Charcoal
themes.description: Apple-inspired blue on dark gray. Clean and modern.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Graphite
themes.description: Vibrant purple on zinc. Sleek and professional.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Obsidian
themes.description: Cyan accent on true dark. Deep and minimal.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Ember
themes.description: Smoked charcoal with ember-red accents. Warm and cinematic.
themes.author: Silo-Server

themes.name: Verdant Ink
themes.description: Cool green-black with softer luminous contrast. Lush and serene.
themes.author: Silo-Server
